block.createvoidtank.void_tank.tooltip: Voids any fluid pumped into it
configuration.createvoidtank.server.acti: Condition that must be met for the Void Tank to void fluid
configuration.createvoidtank.server.mini: Minimum heat level required when using REQUIRES_HEAT mode
createvoidtank.tooltip.summary: Voids any fluid pumped into it
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.header: Voiding Fluids with the Void Tank
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_1: The Void Tank accepts fluids from any side and destroys them instantly
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_2: It never fills up — all fluids are voided on contact
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_3: Fluids can be pumped into the Void Tank through pipes
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_4: When configured to require heat, a heat source must be placed below
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_5: A lit Blaze Burner provides sufficient heat
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_6: When configured to require redstone, a signal must be provided
createvoidtank.ponder.void_tank.text_7: Any redstone signal will activate the tank
